prices.source_block:
Standard Ticket Pricing
We offer flexible pricing so families can choose the experience that works best for them.
Tier / Adult / Youth (Ages 4-18)
Tier A $58.00 $50.00
Tier B $43.00 $37.00
Tier C $30.00 $26.00
All prices are all-inclusive – no additional fees at checkout.

prices.source_phrase: Youth tickets (ages 3–18) are available across all tiers, making it easier for families to attend together.

prices.source_phrase: Do I need a ticket for my child? Yes—everyone attending a performance, regardless of age, must have a ticket.
prices.source_block:
Do I need a ticket for my child?
Yes—everyone attending a performance, regardless of age, must have a ticket.
What is youth pricing?
Youth pricing is available for audiences ages 3–18 across all seating tiers, making it easier for families to attend together.

prices.source_phrase: Additional tickets at 15% off with no additional fees
prices.source_block:
All Members also receive the following benefits
First access to seat reservations
Free date exchanges
Additional tickets at 15% off with no additional fees
15% off education classes (Sept 1, 2025- Aug 31, 2026)
2 Free tickets to the WFT Teen Ensemble Production
Additional $5 off teen ensemble tickets up to 10
Membership pricing includes all fees to keep your membership fee free!

reservation.source_phrase: After clicking “Purchase Tickets,” you’ll be taken to the performance calendar to select your desired date and time.
reservation.source_block:
How do I use a discount or promo code?
After clicking “Purchase Tickets,” you’ll be taken to the performance calendar to select your desired date and time. Once you reach the seating map, click “Have a promotion code?” in the upper right corner, enter your code, and select “Apply” —your ticket prices will update automatically.

hours.source_phrase: Theatre lobby doors open approximately 60 minutes before curtain with theatre house doors opening 30-minutes before the start of the show
hours.source_block:
When should we arrive?
Theatre lobby doors open approximately 60 minutes before curtain with theatre house doors opening 30-minutes before the start of the show
We recommend arriving 30–45 minutes early to allow time for seating and getting settled
All guests must have a ticket to enter the theatre
